assignments.description: Sets Description on the Account record so the calling Apex can verify field write-back.
assignments.name: asgnSetDescription
assignments.label: Set Description

Flow.description: Trivial happy-path flow used by TRG_InvokeFlow_TEST to exercise the real Flow.Interview.createInterview + Flow.Interview.start path. Sets record.Description on an in/out Account variable; pairs with TRG_InvokeFlow_TEST.shouldInvokeRealFlowAndApplyResultsToAccount.
Flow.label: Test_BeforeInsertSetDescription

variables.description: Trigger record passed in by TRG_InvokeFlow. Mutated in place; the calling Apex copies populated fields back onto Trigger.new.
variables.name: record

variables.description: Pre-update record passed in by TRG_InvokeFlow on update events. Read-only; not used by this flow.
variables.name: recordPrior
